text: Did you know CRISPR can cut the wrong genes? This happens when gene editors target unintended DNA locations. Imagine the consequences: unintended mutations could lead to serious issues. Researchers are actively testing and engineering CRISPR for higher specificity. With advancements, we can reduce these off-target effects, making CRISPR safer. Stay updated on CRISPR's journey. Like and follow for more science insights!
